WIC Messaging
Join Smart WIC Messaging by signing up you will receive Appointment Reminders, Prepare you to arrive on-time or reschedule, bring necessary items to the correct location, missed follow-ups and Closed Clinic changes. Current Message Campaigns; Peer Counseling 2-way Texting; Communicate program benefits and activities. Collect client feedback and follow-up individually. This allows you to have continue open and regular communication with WIC staff until you opt-out of messaging.
How to Enroll
How Do I Stop Getting Voice and or Text Messages from WIC?
Fill out form to opt in
Call us
at
(800) 455- 4942
Email us
at
[email protected]
Ask a WIC staff person
to enroll you
Be Sure to Include
Your
Family ID #
(9 numbers)
Your preferred language:
EN
for English
SP
for Spanish
Your
First and Last Name
The type of Message you would like to receive:
Txt
– Want to receive Texts
Call
– Want to receive Voice Messages
All
– Want to receive Voice and Txt
Example
: 111155000 EN Sue Smith Txt
Email:
Email STOP in the email subject line to
[email protected]
Be sure to use the
same Email address
you used to enroll.
Call:
(800) 455-4942
and ask them to Stop sending you Voice messages.
Visit:
Visit a WIC Center and an employee will inactivate your enrollment.
Fill out form to opt out of WIC communication
If you have any questions, please call us at
1 (800) 455-4942
Note - If you opt out we will not be able to contact you about your benefits or appointments.
